<?php namespace Faker\Provider\en_ZA; class Company extends \Faker\Provider\Company { protected static $legalEntities = [ '01', '02', '06', '07', '08', '09', '10', '11', '12', '14', '15', '16', '17', '20', '21', '22', '23', '24', '25', '26', '30', '31', '80', ]; /** * Return a valid company registration number. * * @return string */ public function companyNumber() { return sprintf( '%s/%s/%s', \Faker\Provider\DateTime::dateTimeBetween('-50 years', 'now')->format('Y'), static::randomNumber(6, true), static::randomElement(static::$legalEntities), ); } }
